title: Ground Battle on Hypori
content:

|conc= |next=[[Ground Battle on Dathomir|Battle of Dathomir]] |image=[[File:HyporiBattle.jpg]] |name=Battle of Hypori |conflict= |date=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' places this battle between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle over Coruscant]], which are respectively set in 0 ABY and 3 ABY according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |place=[[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] |result=*Consortium victory **Consortium gains droideka technology **Consortium and Cartel call a truce. |side1=[[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] |side2=*[[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] **[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba's criminal empire]] |side3=[[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]] |side4= |commanders1=*[[Tyber Zann]] *[[Urai Fen]] *[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] {{C|after being bribed}} |commanders2=*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] *[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] {{C|before being bribed}} |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]] *[[Defiler]]s *[[Infantry Support Platform/Legends|ISP speeders]] *[[Droideka Mark II]]s {{C|after reprogramming}} |forces2=*[[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]] *[[All Terrain Attack Pod/Legends|AT-AP walkers]] *[[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]] |forces3=Automated Droideka Mark IIs |forces4= |casual1=Light to moderate |casual2=Nearly all forces |casual3=All Droidekas |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|If I can get this factory operational again, the droids can be reprogrammed to fight for us!|Urai Fen|}} During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a '''battle''' between the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|forces]] of [[Tyber Zann]] and the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] took place on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]. ==Background== {{Quote|It seems Jabba has been digging up the past. According to data we recovered on Saleucami, Jabba's stumbled across an old battle droid factory on Hypori that somehow survived the Clone Wars.|Tyber Zann|}} The battle began after [[Tyber Zann]] learned of a [[Hypori droid factory|droid factory]] [[Battle of Saleucami (Zann Consortium)|discovered]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] on the planet [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]. Zann, alongside [[Urai Fen]] and several troops of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] landed near the factory and, while approaching the controls of the factory, learned that the [[Droideka Mark II]]s were active and openly firing upon his forces. In order to buy time and avoid unnecessary casualties, Tyber, Urai, and the troops sealed blast doors and retreated. The droids, however, fired on the doors, eventually breaking through. ==The battle== {{Quote|The emergency defenses are active. The droids will pursue us until I can shut them down.|Urai Fen|}} Eventually, Urai managed to deactivate the Droidekas, after which the [[Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] landed and prepared himself to assassinate Tyber, who offered in advance triple what Bossk was being paid so that Bossk would serve the Consortium. Jabba then landed on Hypori alongside several soldiers for the Hutt Cartel, who opened fire on Tyber and his forces. Urai Fen eventually managed to reactivate the droidekas, this time assisting the Consortium against the Cartel. Consortium forces, supported by the droids, managed to prevent more soldiers from landing. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Jabba, your men are dead and you are surrounded. I'd say that puts you at a disadvantage.''"
"''We can make a deal, Tyber! There's no need to do anything… permanent.''"
"''The only deal that lets you live is this- The price on my head -- gone. The hits on my territory – stop. The planets Saleucami and Hypori now belong to me. If I see your people anywhere in my territory, I'll personally come to Tatooine and feed you to your own Rancor!|Tyber Zann 'negotiating' with Jabba Desilijic Tiure|}} Jabba, who was still on the planet, was confronted by Tyber, who forced an agreement. In exchange for Jabba leaving without being harmed, Zann would get the planets [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] and Hypori, the bounty on his head off, as well as a truce between them. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Hypori |es=Batalla de Hypori (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Hypori, Ground Battle on}} [[Category:Battles of Hypori]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
